case_title: EQUABLE ASCENT FINANCIAL LLC VS. ROSE MARIE CLEESE et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-19-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUABLE ASCENT FINANCIAL LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CLEESE, ROSE MARIE DOES 1 TO 5, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-26-2012

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST FLINT COREY ZIDE, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-19-2013, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-05-2013. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-19-2013 CONTINUED TO MAY-21-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DEC IN RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE; REQUEST TO SET ASIDE SANCTIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUABLE ASCENT FINANCIAL LLC
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-22-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Bernard Maryanski, Esq. appeared specially for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is ordered off calendar and dissolved. Dismissal on file. Proceedings not reported. (610)
